item.title: 欧盟委员多姆布罗夫斯基斯称动用石油储备是可选方案
item.description: 欧盟经济事务专员瓦尔迪斯·东布罗夫斯基斯表示，在原油价格突破每桶100美元后，欧元区财长们将讨论联合释放石油储备的可能性。【原文：European Union Economy Commissioner Valdis Dombrovskis said euro-area finance chiefs will talk about a possible joint release of oil reserves after crude smashed through $100 a barrel.】

item.title: 特朗普家族的国防投资随着新无人机交易不断增长
item.description: 唐纳德·特朗普总统的长子们正投资一家新无人机公司，在五角大楼加大对无人飞行器系统投入之际，进一步拓展其国防投资组合。【原文：President Donald Trump’s eldest sons are investing in a new drone company, expanding their defense portfolio at a moment when the Pentagon is ramping up its own spending on unmanned aircraft systems.】

item.title: 英国央行近十分之一员工将因节支计划离职
item.description: 为缓解英国央行紧张的财政压力，未来数月约8%的员工将离职。【原文：Around 8% of staff at the Bank of England will leave in the next few months as part of an effort to ease pressure on the bank’s strained finances.】

item.title: 马克龙计划在冲突平息后为霍尔木兹海峡船只提供护航
item.description: 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙寻求启动一项联合海上护航行动，为集装箱船只提供护航，以期在战争初期阶段平息后重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。【原文：French President Emmanuel Macron seeks to launch a joint maritime mission to escort container ships in an effort to reopen the Strait of Hormuz once the initial phase of the war has calmed down.】

item.title: 美国银行为Tegna收购案提供27.5亿美元贷款
item.description: 由美国银行牵头的银团已推出一笔27.5亿美元的杠杆贷款，用于资助Nexstar传媒集团收购竞争对手电视广播公司Tegna的交易。【原文：Banks led by Bank of America Corp. have launched a $2.75 billion leveraged loan to help fund Nexstar Media Group Inc.’s pending acquisition of rival TV-station owner Tegna Inc.】

item.title: 阿布扎比的朱丹收购了OpenAI投资者Alpha Wave的股份
item.description: 阿布扎比新成立的2370亿美元金融服务控股公司Judan正收购另类资产管理公司Alpha Wave Global的多数股权。该公司持有包括SpaceX、Anthropic和OpenAI在内的多家领先人工智能企业的股份。【原文：Abu Dhabi’s new $237 billion financial-services holding company Judan is buying a majority stake in Alpha Wave Global, an alternative asset manager that holds stakes in leading artificial intelligence firms including SpaceX, Anthropic and OpenAI.】

item.title: 俄罗斯黑海主要港口周末恢复装油作业
item.description: 俄罗斯位于新罗西斯克黑海港口的谢什卡里斯石油终端上周末恢复装运，在中东冲突背景下为全球市场带来些许缓解。【原文：Russia’s Sheskharis oil terminal at the Black Sea port of Novorossiysk resumed loadings over weekend, bringing some relief to the global market amid the Middle East conflict.】

item.title: 能源冲击重塑欧洲利率路径，交易员押注加息
item.description: 就在一个月前，欧洲央行行长克里斯蒂娜·拉加德还宣称通胀处于"良好状态"。如今欧洲正加速滑向新一轮能源危机，交易员们传递出的信号却截然不同。【原文：Just a month ago, European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde declared that inflation was in a “good place.” With Europe now hurtling toward another energy crisis, traders are signaling a very different view.】

item.title: 摩根大通预计标普500指数将修正10%，因战争风险不断累积
item.description: 摩根大通交易部门指出，美国股市交易员尚未为标普500指数可能出现的调整做好准备——受伊朗战争影响，该指数或从峰值下跌多达10%。【原文：US stock traders are unprepared for a correction in the S&P 500 that could see the gauge falling as much as 10% from its peak as a result of the war in Iran, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s trading desk.】

item.title: 艾瑞尼克聘请阿波罗资本王某，推动对冲基金私募股权业务
item.description: 以激进主义运动著称的对冲基金Irenic Capital Management正拓展其私募股权业务，并聘请了前阿波罗全球管理公司（Apollo Global Management Inc.）主管负责该业务。【原文：Hedge fund Irenic Capital Management, known for its activism campaigns, is building out its private equity practice and has hired an ex-Apollo Global Management Inc. principal to oversee it.】

item.title: 金宝汤继承人与高校争夺6500万美元捐赠基金
item.description:
费城艺术大学的关闭引发了一场法庭之争，焦点在于如何分配该校留下的资金。

【原文：

The closure of Philadelphia’s University of the Arts unleashed a court fight over how to divvy up the cash it left behind.

】

item.title: 微软推出全新月费99美元的人工智能软件套装
item.description: 微软公司正推出一套新的办公软件组合，旨在吸引更多用户使用其面向办公场景的人工智能工具。【原文：Microsoft Corp. is launching a new bundle of workplace software with the aim of getting more people to use its artificial intelligence tools for the office.】

item.title: 大众汽车进军储能领域，应对电动汽车电池需求疲软
item.description: 大众汽车集团正将电池业务的野心从电动汽车领域拓展至大规模储能与能源交易领域，因全球电动汽车需求未达预期。【原文：Volkswagen AG is broadening its battery ambitions beyond electric vehicles into large-scale energy storage and trading as global EV demand falls short of expectations.】

item.title: Netflix在未达成华纳交易的情况下，从并购失败者蜕变为市场赢家
item.description: 奈飞公司股价正上演戏剧性反转，起因是管理层上月底决定放弃收购华纳兄弟探索公司的计划。【原文：Netflix Inc.’s stock price is staging a dramatic reversal triggered by management’s decision to walk away from its proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. late last month.】

item.title: 活动人士OneMove推动软件公司Sylogist董事会改组
item.description: 激进投资者OneMove Capital Ltd.正试图改组加拿大软件制造商Sylogist Ltd.的董事会，称董事们在公司向云端业务模式转型过程中处理不当。【原文：Activist investor OneMove Capital Ltd. is seeking to shake up the board of Canadian software maker Sylogist Ltd., saying directors mishandled the company’s shift to a cloud-based business model.】

item.title: 优步在美国扩大女性司机选项，因性侵案件激增
item.description: 优步科技公司表示，一项旨在匹配女性乘客与女司机的特色功能将在全美范围内推出，此举旨在扩大安全措施的覆盖范围，同时该公司正致力于解决来自美国乘客的数千起性侵投诉。【原文：Uber Technologies Inc. said that a feature designed to match female riders and drivers will be available nationwide, expanding access to a safety measure as it seeks to resolve thousands of sexual assault complaints from passengers in the US.】

item.title: 墨西哥通胀率飙升超预期，突破目标区间上限
item.description: 墨西哥2月份年度通胀率加速上升幅度超出预期，突破了政策制定者设定的目标区间上限。此前该国央行暂停了持续的宽松周期，以评估新税种和关税的影响。【原文：Mexico’s annual inflation accelerated more than expected in February to breach the top of policymakers’ target range, after the central bank paused an extended easing cycle to assess the impact of new taxes and tariffs.】

item.title: 瑞士国家银行必须"立即"介入市场以削弱瑞郎汇率，Junius表示
item.description: 据J Safra Sarasin银行首席经济学家卡斯滕·尤尼乌斯称，瑞士国家银行极有可能正在干预外汇市场以遏制瑞郎升值。【原文：The Swiss National Bank is very likely to be intervening in currency markets to curb the franc’s strength, according to Karsten Junius, chief economist at Bank J Safra Sarasin.】

item.title: 软件初创公司Factorial正以20亿美元估值进行融资谈判
item.description: 据知情人士透露，西班牙初创企业Factorial正就新一轮融资展开初步磋商，此轮融资将使该公司估值翻倍至20亿美元。该公司主要为企业提供人力资源软件服务。【原文：Factorial, a Spanish startup supplying human resources software to enterprises, is in early discussions to raise new funding that will double its valuation to $2 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 丹格特炼油厂将优先保障尼日利亚燃料供应，首席执行官表示
item.description: 亿万富翁阿里科·丹格特旗下的炼油厂表示，只要能够获得本地原油，就将优先向其本土市场尼日利亚供应燃料。【原文：Billionaire Aliko Dangote’s oil refinery said it will prioritize supplying fuel in Nigeria, its home market, as long as it can access local crude.】

item.title: 政策制定者迅速行动，伊朗战争推动油价突破100美元大关
item.description: 当油价飙升至每桶100美元以上时，政策制定者们从观望态度转向了行动模式。【原文：Policy makers shifted from their weight-and-watch stance to action mode as oil shot above $100 a barrel.】

item.title: 特朗普对伊朗的战争搅动全球化重要枢纽
item.description: 从化肥到铝材，全球货物贸易通过陆路、海运、铁路和航空运输，经由海湾地区流通。【原文：From fertilizer to aluminum, global goods trade over land, sea, rail and air flows through the Gulf region】

item.title: 卡尔希与Polymarket携手推出基于标普500指数的股票期权交易
item.description: 押注标普500指数走势的经典方式是在期权市场操作，通过购买与预设价格挂钩的看跌期权或看涨期权来实现。【原文：The classic way to bet on the direction of the S&P 500 Index is in the options market, buying puts or calls tied to a preset price.】

item.title: 默茨的经济计划因州选举失利再遇挫折
item.description: 弗里德里希·梅尔茨整顿德国经济的任务变得更加艰巨。【原文：Friedrich Merz’s job fixing Germany’s economy just got even harder.】

item.title: 美国盘前活跃股：Dianthus、Hims、杰富瑞、Live Nation
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7点49分，标普500指数期货下跌1.1%，伊朗战争推动油价自2022年以来首次突破每桶100美元大关。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures are down 1.1% as of 7:49 a.m. in New York as the Iran war pushes the price of oil above $100 per barrel for the first time since 2022.】

item.title: 美国股指期货下跌，油价飙升加剧通胀担忧
item.description: 美国股市在经历10月以来最大单周跌幅后，正准备延续抛售态势。伊朗战争可能长期化的前景推高能源价格，并加剧了对通胀的担忧。【原文：US stocks are poised to extend a selloff after the biggest weekly drop since October, as the prospect of a prolonged war in Iran sent energy prices soaring and stoked fears over inflation.】

item.title: 伊朗危机或将考验紧急石油储备的效力
item.description: 战略储备的释放不太可能完全解决当前的石油供应中断问题。【原文：A release from strategic reserves is unlikely to fully resolve the current oil disruption.】

item.title: 丹格特化肥公司称伊朗战争引发订单激增
item.description: 非洲最大的作物营养素生产商之一丹格特化肥有限公司，其产品需求量大幅增长，原因是美以对伊朗的战争导致供应中断。【原文：Dangote Fertiliser Ltd., one of Africa’s biggest producers of crop nutrients, has seen a substantial increase in demand for its products as the US-Israel war on Iran disrupts supplies.】

item.title: 伊朗周六从其哈尔格岛终端装载原油
item.description: 伊朗周六继续在其哈尔格岛石油终端向油轮装载原油，此前一周美国和以色列对这个波斯湾国家发动了空袭。目前尚不清楚装载作业是否仍在进行，因为此后没有新的卫星图像。【原文：Iran continued loading crude onto tankers at its Kharg Island oil terminal on Saturday, a week after the US and Israel launched air attacks against the Persian Gulf country. It’s unclear whether loading operations have continued, with no new satellite images since then.】

item.title: 多尔西在人工智能利弊与失业问题上态度摇摆
item.description: 裁员之后，Block董事长不确定人工智能对员工究竟是利是弊【原文：After job cuts, the Block chairman wasn’t sure whether AI would help or hurt workers】
